checkin.journal:
Grateful for: My team being able to have sex, Cosita family friends ❤️❤️❤️, Being alive, being able to function without sleep, even though my brain is getting super agitated, my nervous system is getting superior, but I'll get there
Today great: Me async in the talks with Maria and Danil, i need to make this straight. Acing other meetings.
Affirmation: I'm a happy and humble person, and yeah, I need to sleep. 
Amazing things: It was a good morning session of me exercising my power
Better: I'm no
